comment: ZeRO-3 with CPU offload of the OPTIMIZER ONLY (params + grads stay sharded on-GPU). For FULL fine-tuning of the 14B DreamZero model on 2x GH200: the fp32 Adam optimizer (~168GB) is far too big for HBM, so it is streamed to the Grace 480GB host over NVLink-C2C; the bf16 param + grad shards (~14GB each per GPU across 2-way ZeRO-3) stay resident in HBM, avoiding the per-forward param all-gather-from-CPU that offload_param would add. Same ZeRO-3 code path as zero3.json/zero3_offload.json (keeps the VAE-partition fix), just optimizer offload added. Kept outside groot/ so groot stays verbatim.
